title: Enumerate Network Interfaces
html:
🆕 Enumerate Network Interfaces

{% include "../../.gitbook/includes/admin-privs.md" %}

Enumerate network interfaces on a host:

nxc smb <target> -u <username> -p <password> --interfaces
